name: logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics carriers managing 5-15 vehicles, inefficient vehicle utilization causes high maintenance costs. We provide a vehicle fleet tracking system instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient vehicle utilization and high maintenance costs.
